name: io.github.Noquarter6/contractor-license-mcp-server
title: Contractor License Verification (TradesAPI)
description: Verify US contractor licenses in 45 states — status, expiration, disciplinary history.

environmentVariables.name: CLV_API_URL
environmentVariables.description: TradesAPI backend URL. Use https://www.tradesapi.com unless you have a reason to override.

environmentVariables.name: CLV_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Your TradesAPI key. Get one free at https://www.tradesapi.com (50 credits, no credit card).
